label: Hail Immortal Bacchus (from "Judith")
description:
Hail Immortal Bacchus (from "Judith") by Thomas Augustine Arne.



Vocal score and parts in Gerald Finzi's hand. Full score in another hand; continue unrealised.

metadata.label: Collection
metadata.value: Manuscripts in 20th century handwriting collected by Gerald Finzi

metadata.label: Credit line
metadata.value: Image Courtesy of the University of St Andrews Library, ID FIN M2004.A8J8

metadata.label: Image delivery
metadata.value: Working in partnership with Kakadu to deliver high quality image reproductions via IIIF.
